case_title: HYDE SF APARTMENTS, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. HOA K. CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION (DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $13.93) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE SF APARTMENTS, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HOA K.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYDE SF APARTMENTS, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, HOA K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 300 HYDE STREET, UNIT NUMBER 12 , SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109, *** INCLUDING ALL UKNOWN OCCUPANTS ON THE PREMISE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HOA K.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE SF APARTMENTS, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HOA K. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
